description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a sleeveless hoodie with a front pocket and visible drawstrings. He wears fitted pants with a knee pad on the right leg and a utility belt, suggesting a practical, street-ready style. The figure has sturdy, high-top boots suitable for walking on various urban surfaces. On his head, he sports a pair of goggles resting above his forehead, and his hair is styled in a medium-length, slightly tousled manner. The back of the hoodie displays the word 'FREE' in bold letters, adding a distinctive detail. The overall appearance is that of a modern, active pedestrian, possibly a young adult or teenager, ready for movement in an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a sleeveless hoodie, utility pants, boots, and goggles, styled for urban activity. The figure has a practical, streetwise look with a distinctive 'FREE' logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless hoodie, goggles on the forehead, utility belt, and knee pad on the right leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the boots, the fit of the pants, and the side of the hood.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the 'FREE' logo on the back of the hoodie and the back details of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side profile of the figure, including the knee pad and the side of the hood.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless hoodie, utility pants with knee pad, utility belt, and high-top boots, accessorized with goggles
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
